title: ARVO Iron On Hemming Tape – 30m x 2cm Hem Tape for Trousers, Curtains, Clothes – No Sew Hemming Web for Fabric Repairs & Alterations – Washable Fabric Adhesive Strip
features: Simple No-Sew Hemming – Quick and Clean Fabric Fixes: This hemming tape offers a straightforward alternative to sewing. It bonds fabric layers neatly when heat is applied, making it easy to carry out quick repairs or adjustments without needle and thread. NOTE: This product is not recommended for heat sensitive and delicate fabrics.

For Clothing, Curtains, and Craft Projects: Ideal for various applications including hemming tape for trousers, adjusting dress or skirt lengths, or resizing drapes. Also works well for hemming tape for curtains, fabric-based crafts, or small decorative projects at home.

Easy to Use with Clear Instructions: This iron on hemming tape is designed for simplicity—just cut, position, and press with an iron. Clear usage instructions are provided, making it suitable for both beginners and occasional use.

30m Long, 2cm Wide – Cut to Fit as Needed: Each roll of hem tape provides 30 metres in length and 2 cm in width. It can be trimmed to suit your project, whether you're adjusting one hem or working on multiple garments.

Reliable Hold That Stays Put After Washing: Made from lightweight non-woven fabric with a secure adhesive, this hem tape iron on for trousers is designed to stay in place through everyday wear and regular machine washing. The bonded fabric can be machine washed at 40°C; however, tumble drying is not recommended.
